Services Compliance Contacts
CARBON NEGATIVE

ESG & Sustainability

Carbon-Negative IT Disposal. Full environmental reporting, zero landfill commitment, and circular economy integration for UK enterprises with ESG ITAD solutions.

Processing Flow

1

Carbon Footprint Assessment

Baseline measurement per asset

2

Maximum Lifecycle Extension

Repair, upgrade, remarketing priority

3

Responsible Recycling

WEEE-compliant material recovery

4

Carbon Offset Calculation

Verified environmental benefit

5

ESG Report Generation

Audit-ready documentation for stakeholders

Compliance & Standards

♻️

WEEE Compliant

Full regulatory adherence, documentation provided

🛡️

Security-First Approach

Data security integrated into sustainability workflow

✅

Certified Data Destruction

No trade-off between security and environmental goals

📋

Audit Trail

Complete chain of custody documentation

Environmental Metrics

🌳

Zero Landfill Commitment

100% material diversion for carbon-neutral IT disposal

💎

Precious Metal Recovery

Gold, silver, palladium from circuit boards in IT recycling process

🔄

Plastic-to-Plastic Recycling

Closed-loop processing where possible for WEEE-compliant recycling

📊

Carbon Reporting

Scope 3 emissions reduction documentation for ESG reporting

Verification

Verified via internal carbon impact methodology.

Deliverables: Annual ESG summary, asset-level carbon impact, sustainability certificates for board reporting and IT carbon footprint assessment.

Contact an expert for carbon-negative IT disposal, WEEE-compliant computer recycling, and comprehensive ESG reporting for corporate sustainability initiatives
